core_loop: Setup fixes venue/adjudicator/genre/stakes; per exchange: Appraise (read audience/judge, partial-reveal ladder) -> pick Style (Genre x Orientation) -> Argue roll (pool + genre/audience/Recall/armature bonuses) -> resolve CLASH/REINFORCE/CROSS/TIE -> Persuasion Track moves, Face/Concentration deplete -> repeat -> Decisive/Compromise/Total outcome -> Domain Echo + Obligation + Thread co-movement.

decision_points.where: Step 2 Style pick (Genre x Orientation, 4 cards)
decision_points.note: genre half wired via CR4 stasis; orientation's CR5 risk/reward (Doubt Marker + self-Face backfire) is design-table only, not resolver-consumed yet

decision_points.options: choose style against a coarsely-revealed adjudicator conviction vector
decision_points.note: continuous delta-sigma leverage, never a lookup table

decision_points.options: Regroup / Concede a Point / keep arguing

decision_points.where: which of the four games to engage (Agon/Negotiation/Inquiry/Consensus)
decision_points.note: only Agon is wired; the other three raise NotImplementedError (Stage 4 not yet built) - KNOWN-TRACKED

decision_points.options: declare support, risk 1 strain on fail

north_star.collision_feed: Feeds the collision engine via Obligations (durable, verifiable, cross-scale commitments), Domain Echo (Mandate/Domain-Action bonuses), Conviction Scars, and Chain Contests (deferred tension -> next-season scene). These are real narrative hooks once fired - but 3 of 4 game shapes that should diversify how contests play don't exist yet.
north_star.verdict: Points at the North Star in design (a well-theorized bet-under-uncertainty armature, cross-scale Obligations) but the executable slice is currently one game wearing eight venue skins, so today's realized choice density is narrower than the design promises.

nq.observation: Adjudicator Armature: continuous 4-axis Style-vs-conviction dot product via delta-sigma leverage, Appraise reveals only coarse bands - genuine bet under uncertainty, never solved to a single dominant style.
Contest and combat/core now share one sigma-leverage substrate (CR2/CR6) - real cross-system Smoothness win.
Terminal Doubt (ED-1060, open) exists because Obscuring was strictly dominated in every single-exchange proceeding without it - a caught non-dominance violation, not yet ratified.

threadwork_junctures.juncture: Weaving in Contests (TS-gated bonus dice + Coherence check)
threadwork_junctures.evidence: social_contest_v30.md §9.3 (R-65); archived audit calls social 'clean' vs combat's structural gap

threadwork_junctures.juncture: Thread Ops Between Exchanges + Temporal Axis Conflict routing to Track co-movement
Adjudicator Thread Response (Certainty-indexed C5-C0 table + visibility gate)
Any threadwork/Leap/Weaving code in the rebuilt sim kernel
threadwork_junctures.evidence: grep across sim/personal/contest/*.py finds zero thread hooks; the 'clean' archived verdict (2026-06-11) predates this Stage 0-3 rebuild and assessed the design doc, not this kernel - doc-present/code-absent gap, likely just not-yet-scheduled rather than deliberate

legibility.note: Yes for an Agon-shaped proceeding: Persuasion Track + Face/Concentration show risk, armature+faction-boost+targeting show wants, Obligations/Chain Contests show next-season consequence. No for Negotiation/Inquiry/Consensus - those game states don't exist yet (NotImplementedError), so the test can't be run against them.

degenerate_candidates: Recall +2D citation bonus - near-costless, near-always-take per-exchange in Formal Contest - social_contest_v30.md §4 Step 3
Agon-only game space - 8 proceeding skins currently resolve through one mechanical shape - sim/personal/contest/wrapper.py GAMES table (KNOWN-TRACKED, Stage 4 next)

Orientation choice's risk/reward not resolver-consumed, so nothing yet stops Obscuring from drifting back toward dominance/irrelevance outside the still-open ED-1060 fix - dictionaries.py DOUBT_MARKER scope_note

edges.mechanism: Memory/Projection decisive-win Mandate+1 or Domain-Action bonus
edges.cite: social_contest_v30.md §6; wrapper.py notes faction.py is Stage-4 scope
present in design doc; zero hooks in sim/personal/contest/

edges.mechanism: +1D per cited Finding, cap +2D, contest prep
edges.cite: social_contest_v30.md §9.1; no fieldwork import in sim package

edges.mechanism: Obligation blocks NPC actions that would violate it

directions.top-down: The Adjudicator Armature is philosophy-grounded (Padgett-Ansell robust-action/multivocality) theory landing cleanly in a concrete, testable mechanic.
directions.bottom-up: The sim kernel is narrower than the design doc on two fronts at once right now (only Agon wired; orientation payoff and Face-strain unconsumed) - a deliberate staged gap, not silent drift.
directions.lateral: Contest's continuous armature is more sophisticated than npc_behavior's flat categorical Resonant-Style +1D at the same job (hidden-preference targeting) - a live asymmetry armature.py itself flags as a future Jordan reconciliation.
directions.diagonal: Obligations bridge personal-scale contest outcomes to faction Mandate/Stability and settlement-scoped conditions - a clean cross-scale throughline.
directions.forwards: Stage 4 (Negotiation/Inquiry/Consensus) is this lane's single highest-leverage next step; the walkthrough doc already specifies genuinely divergent UI shapes for it.
directions.backwards: MS/RS naming drift and the '§3 combat-pool historical analogy only' note show the corpus correctly self-annotating supersession rather than silently carrying stale references.

findings.claim: Only 'agon' is a WIRED resolver in the GAMES router; consensus/negotiation/inquiry are STUB rows that raise NotImplementedError, so today's contest system is one mechanical shape across 8 venue skins.
findings.tracked_ref: CLAUDE.md calibration 'social-contest rebuild Stages 0-3 done (Stage 4 next)'; walkthrough_v1 §4 staged plan

findings.claim: Orientation (Revealing/Obscuring) only structurally derives CLASH/REINFORCE/CROSS in code; the CR5 Doubt-Marker/self-Face-backfire payoff that gives Obscuring its risk/reward shape is a design-table commitment the resolver does not yet consume.
findings.tracked_ref: overlaps ED-1060 (Terminal Doubt, still open) but the general resolver-non-consumption is only a code scope_note, no dedicated ED

findings.claim: Face's strip/strain-consumption channel (strain->Rattled->-1D) is prose-only; Standing is monotonic-up in the kernel, so the CR3 'spend Face to attack, risk your own Face' tradeoff isn't yet an experienced consequence.
findings.cite: social_contest_v30.md §4 Step 6 honesty note, §8 CR3 Face scope-honest status
findings.tracked_ref: self-flagged as Stage 3 rhetoric-armature scope gap

findings.claim: The rebuilt sim/personal/contest/ package has zero threadwork/Leap/Weaving code despite §9.3/9.4/9.4b being well-specified in the design doc; the archived 'clean' threadwork verdict predates this rebuild and assessed prose, not this kernel.

The Stage-3 Adjudicator Armature (continuous 4-axis dot product, delta-sigma leverage, partial-reveal Appraise bands) is a strong genuine-uncertainty bet mechanic, notably more sophisticated than the sibling npc_behavior categorical Resonant-Style +1D it deliberately does not duplicate.
The +2D Recall citation bonus is available in either genre with no real opportunity cost besides prep, making it a near-always-take checkbox rather than a bet in per-exchange (Formal Contest) form.
